strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) heavily utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Directly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, MCP, and agentic workflows.
Exceptional software craftsmanship and testing background, including TDD, CI/CD, and custom testing framework creation.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and the specific modern testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) requested.
Kotlin and Python experience is missing, and Java experience is mostly from older roles (2016-2018).
Running a concurrent founder role (GISCollective) alongside full-time employment might prompt questions regarding focus and time commitment.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with well over the required 6 years of software engineering experience, perfectly aligning with the core stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He brings highly relevant, niche experience in AI agent development and Kubernetes, alongside a demonstrated passion for software craftsmanship, testing, and architecture. Although he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js and Kotlin, his fundamental engineering skills, diverse language background, and extensive full-stack expertise make him an outstanding fit.
